description_long: This handbag features a cylindrical, quiver-like body crafted from a reddish-brown material, accented with prominent white stitching along the seams and edges. The main compartment is open at one end, suggesting easy access for storing personal items. Two straps are attached: one long, thin strap for shoulder or crossbody wear, and a shorter, wider strap that may serve as a handle or decorative element. The stitching is arranged in both straight and crisscross patterns, adding a handcrafted, rustic aesthetic. The surface appears matte and slightly textured, with no visible hardware or branding. The overall design is simple yet distinctive, evoking a handmade or artisanal style.
description: A cylindrical, reddish-brown handbag with white decorative stitching, featuring both a long shoulder strap and a shorter handle. The open-top design and stitched details give it a rustic, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical body, open end, and both straps with visible white stitching.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular opening and the long strap hanging down.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the crisscross stitching and the full length of both straps.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the crisscross stitching on the body and the open compartment.
attribute_strap_type: One long shoulder or crossbody strap and one shorter, wide handle; both fixed and non-adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Open-top with no visible closure mechanism.
attribute_decorative_elements: White stitching in straight and crisscross patterns along seams and body.
